name: || Appendix...? || Eccentric fighter... ||
description:
Artist: John Kafka (X)

“Appendixes are just like me... they do nothing for you. Then puts you through a near-death situation out of nowhere...”

lWhere did she come from? No clue. What does she do? Whatever she likes. Does she knows she exists? 50/50. What purpose does she serve? none. What is she? Freedom.

_______________________________________________

I saw her in a dream and she took me places and shit and she was weird as hell. Anyways you got your truly weird trope properly done! Here is appendix 🤑🤑🤑🤑

I love her she’s so silly 😭😭😭😭

You can just not fight her btw
